additions.reason: The legend column scrolls (`overflow: auto`) once its rows outgrow the clamped width, and a tabindex-less overflow box is a keyboard trap (WCAG 2.1.1). The legend carries tabindex="0" and role="group" with an aria-label so a keyboard user can reach and scroll it. React's DoughnutChart.jsx has no equivalent affordance on its own legend. This is Angular ahead of the pattern, not diverging from it -- figure-with-data-table does not require it.
